reviews.review_description: Prologue is amazing. Now with my Galaxy S10e plays it perfectly🤎 The new update is wonderful😁

This app is meant to demo the control system of the Gear VR. 
At the same time, it manages to entertain and amuse as you find yourself interacting with an animated origami dinosaur in Paperland.
Great use of light fog
How do you bluetooth a controller to a gear vr?
If the game would play and not stick every few seconds it would be much more enjoyable. This happened to 4 different people on different devices.so it's not us it's the game
Great way to do the first steps with the Gear VR. Really beautiful!
Although its free its a great app to show show the features of vr. The graphics are beautiful and  the design is fantastic.
Too bad it's not a real game...

reviews.review_title: A Great Demo...  broken on current phone
reviews.review_description:
This worked marvelously on my S7, but on my new S10, it hangs right before the dino pops out of the book.  It seems likely that a minor programming tweak would fix this...  it's likely a "race condition" error... but this is OCULUS-MADE so there's no excuse for them not fixing this, or avoiding it in the first place.

I will update this to a 5-star rsting, when and if Oculus gets off their collective butts and fixes the issue.
I love this VR headset.
Just amazing...crazy level of presence and one of the best looking experiences on the rift
Like the story line and visuals

reviews.review_title: Beautiful and great intro to VR
reviews.review_description:
Only criticism is that the swipe forward after the first one doesn't work if you swipe fast. I'm a crusty veteran of gear vr and it puzzled me for a while - so probably needs fixing. 

Also, I would love to see you release these assets so that a game could be made in this paper city. 

Beautiful.
This is the app that I'm showing everyone when they try on the headset for the first time. Simple but powerful, and the art style is so well done.
Nice introduction to the world of VR. :-)
Nice

reviews.review_title: No longer compatible with Samsung S8+!
reviews.review_description: Fantastic tutorial - unfortunately, it is no longer compatible with any of our S8+.  Tried all three of ours, and same issue - installed version won't run and the site will not download it, giving the error, "Not Compatible with your device"!
I turned on my Gear VR with low expectation. But this introduction immediately mesmerized me with its immersive VR content.
Very very cool thx

reviews.review_title: I think everyone should do this first!
reviews.review_description: Gives you a good idea of what is possible and I love showing it to other people.
